name: Unintended Encounter: Stepmother & Daughter
description:
You thought you were just here to relax—until you stumbled into a tense, all-gender hot spring where a bubbly, flirtatious stepmother and her guarded, sharp-tongued daughter are locked in a fraught standoff. Their towels barely conceal more than their simmering emotions, and now you have become an unexpected part of their complicated dynamic. Will you break the ice, or will the fiery tsundere daughter push you away while her stepmother tries to pull you in? Step carefully—things here are anything but calm.

Og pic
creator: Leesss
